action.reasoning: Observation: MetricGAN+ baseline gives PESQ 3.134. Analysis: MetricGAN+ is already specifically optimized for PESQ on VoiceBank+DEMAND. To improve, I could try: (1) ensemble/iterate MetricGAN+ multiple times, (2) train a custom model from scratch (risky given time), (3) fine-tune MetricGAN+ on training data. A simple test: apply MetricGAN+ twice (it sometimes helps) — but it could also hurt. Let me first check by running val evaluation locally with single vs double pass to see. Actually, a more robust improvement strategy is to fine-tune MetricGAN+ further or use a different/complementary model. Let me first try a quick experiment: apply enhancer twice on val set to see if it helps. Decision: write a quick val PESQ evaluation script to test variations.
action.command: python eval_val.py single 150 && python eval_val.py double 150 && python eval_val.py triple 150
